mapper.insert: INSERT INTO todo_attachments (todo_id, original_file_name, stored_file_name, content_type, file_size) VALUES (#{todoId}, #{originalFileName}, #{storedFileName}, #{contentType}, #{fileSize})
mapper.select: SELECT id, todo_id, original_file_name, stored_file_name, content_type, file_size, created_at FROM todo_attachments WHERE todo_id = #{todoId} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, todo_id, original_file_name, stored_file_name, content_type, file_size, created_at FROM todo_attachments WHERE id = #{id} AND todo_id = #{todoId}
